text:
- BUMP PORTREVISION
- There is an update in devel/commoncpp port, In favor of the latest update of commoncpp (ports/137542)
Please, here is an update in your port and I'd like to know your opinion about it.

You can see the log of ccrtp with BUMP PORTREVISION in mine tinderbox:
http://www.scjamorim.org/Home/ccrtp-1.6.2_1.log 

Port maintainer (acm@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
